    17,177 olivares.ai
    Olivares.AI
    🛠️ 1 tool
    Alma Creator — Everything you need to create — one plan. What's new: Alma Creator plan ($89/mo) — AI chat with persistent memory, video generation, music studio, image creation, and 12 creative tools in a single subscription. No separate add-ons. Creator Max plan ($189/mo) — 3x AI capacity, 480 video credits/month, 25 minutes of music/month. For professionals who need more. Music Studio — ElevenLabs Premium — Studio-grade AI music generation. Up to 10 minutes per track. Vocals, custom lyrics, instrumentals. 30-second to 10-minute tracks in any genre. Music Studio — MiniMax Music — Quick music generation included in Pro+ plans. Up to 4 minutes with vocals. 12 genres. No add-on required. Avatar Videos — HeyGen Avatar IV — Generate talking-head videos with AI avatars. Searchable avatar gallery, voice selection with preview, custom scripts. Video Studio — Text to Video — Generate videos directly from text prompts. No source image needed. 12 cinematic styles, 12 camera movements. Image Studio — Dual models — Leonardo AI and Flux Pro. 10 style presets (Natural, Cinematic, Photography, Anime, Pixel Art, Watercolor, 3D, Sketch, Neon, Minimalist). Public image sharing — Share any generated image via public link with full prompt visible. Recipients can download or generate their own version. Creator landing page — Dedicated page at olivares.ai/creator with full feature comparison, pricing breakdown, target audience guide, and FAQ. Annual billing — 10% discount on all plans. Creator annual: $80.10/mo. Creator Max annual: $170.10/mo. Unified credit system for video — One credit pool that works across Gen-4 Turbo and Gen-4.5. Users choose quality vs quantity per generation. Tracks in Music History — Play, download as MP3, copy prompts to iterate. Both ElevenLabs and MiniMax tracks in one library.

  • Palabra.ai v1.0
    Real-time AI speech translator with near-zero latency.
    Live translations
    Open
    2,209 www.palabra.ai
    Artem
    🛠️ 1 tool
    Palabra Bot is now live and it comes with two modes built for different real-world communication needs. Conversational Mode Whether you're closing a deal with an international client, running a cross-border team meeting or supporting a user in their native language — language should never slow you down. Conversational Mode enables two people speaking different languages to communicate as if they shared the same one. The bot listens, translates, and speaks back in real time — so you can focus on the conversation, not the translation. Presentation Mode If you’re hosting a webinar, running a training session or presenting at a conference — your message should reach everyone, regardless of language. Presentation Mode allows one speaker to present to many listeners in their own language in real time without interrupting the flow of the presentation. You don’t need separate tools, interpreters or delays anymore. Just share your meeting link, choose your language and Palabra Bot will join the conversation automatically.

    Productivity
    Open
    158,161 radiantapp.com
    Laura James
    🛠️ 1 tool
    Supernormal is out of beta with its biggest release yet. The desktop app now lives in your menu bar on Mac and taskbar on Windows, launching automatically at login so every meeting is captured from the moment you sit down. When a meeting ends, supernormal.com opens automatically so you can turn your capture into completed work right away. Generate a presentation, spreadsheet, or document from any meeting in seconds. Organise meetings into projects and ask Supernormal to draft status updates, emails, or research directly from your meeting context. Version 2.1.0 also brings mobile meeting capture from supernormal.com, expanded language support including English, German, French, Italian, Portuguese, Spanish, and Swedish, and reliability and speed improvements throughout.

  • Recall v2
    Summarize Anything, Forget Nothing!
    Knowledge Bases
    Open
    77,456 www.recall.wiki
    Paul Richards
    🛠️ 1 tool 🙏 9 karma
    Everyone is looking to AI for answers. But with Recall, you can prioritize your own knowledge first and foremost. Choose to chat with your saved insights and invite the internet in as a supplement. That's the priority order we believe it should follow. This update lets you get answers that no other AI can provide, as it is grounded in the sources you intentionally chose to save and the notes you specifically took. Ask questions, and Recall pulls from your curated knowledge base. Agentic Chat: You Control the Conversation Choose to chat with your own knowledge base, the internet, or both. Pick from frontier AI models like GPT 5.4, Claude, Gemini (on the max plan) Ask powerful, open-ended questions across your knowledge: "Condense all my research from the last month" "Now enrich it with the latest studies" "Find the exact clip where this was mentioned" Play content directly inside Recall, upload files and images. API & MCP: Access Your Knowledge From Anywhere Recall's API and MCP are finally here! Bring your personal knowledge into other tools and workflows to amplify your impact. Get set up in our docs → https://docs.recall.it/public-api 3X Faster, More Intuitive, More Inclusive A complete UI/UX revamp paired with a new brand and domain, find us at our new home: www.recall.it Major backend upgrades deliver significant performance improvements, especially on mobile Now supporting X and Reddit imports to capture insights from more sources Introducing Recall Max For power users ready to push the boundaries of personal knowledge management, we now offer Recall Max: Access frontier language models like GPT-5.4, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, and Gemini. Unlock bulk ai actions : multi-file summarization, bulk tagging, bulk connections and batch PDF uploads

    Draw3D V2 — Changelog Core Update Introduced unified workflow: Sketch → 3D Blockout → Image → Animation New Features Sketch to photorealistic image generation 3D blockout to image rendering Image to animation conversion Built-in drawing canvas AI image transformation tool High-quality image upscaling Project-based creation system Layer-Based Prompt (NEW) Added support for writing and managing prompts directly on top of the drawing canvas Users can annotate different parts of the sketch with separate prompt layers Enables region-specific control for generation (style, lighting, materials, details) Improves precision and creative control in Sketch → Image workflow Each layer can be edited, enabled, or disabled independently AI Improvements Better prompt understanding Improved style consistency Enhanced lighting, depth, and realism Performance & UX Faster generation speed Simplified, beginner-friendly interface Smoother creative workflow Fixes Reduced generation errors Improved output accuracy and stability

  • Pounce v1.5
    Get real followers and engagement in minutes.
    Social media engagement
    Open
    5,304 www.pounce.so
    Gilad Avidan
    🛠️ 1 tool
    ✨ Campaigns 1. Multi-campaign monitoring — Create independent campaigns, each with its own Twitter and Reddit rules, filters, and strategy. Monitor different audiences without them stepping on each other. 2. Campaign switcher — Choose which campaign to run right from the session start screen. One tap, you're in. 🧠 Smarter AI 1. Better reply quality — AI replies sound more natural. No more "hits different" or "is actually the move" — just thoughtful, human-sounding responses. 2. Improved search rules — Twitter monitoring finds more relevant conversations out of the box. 3. Your tweets, filtered out — Your own tweets no longer clutter the inbox. Only other people's conversations show up. 🎨 Redesigned Onboarding & Refinement 1. Step-by-step setup — New guided wizards walk you through connecting Twitter and Reddit, setting search rules, and configuring filters. 2. Refinement flow — Tell us what's working and what isn't in plain English. The AI plans changes, you review them, and applies them with one click. 3. Twitter strategy page — Fine-tune how your AI replies are generated with a dedicated strategy settings page. 4. Connect & disconnect — Easily add or remove Twitter and Reddit accounts from Settings. 📱 Mobile Support 1. Redesigned login & signup — Larger tap targets, password visibility toggle, and no more iOS auto-zoom on input fields. 2. Mobile-friendly setup wizards — Better spacing, readable font sizes, and breathing room on small screens. 📊 Stats & Transparency 1. X Followers chart — Redesigned as a clean column chart with proper spacing. Switch accounts and see the right follower stats. 2. Public changelog — Now available at `/changelog` so you can always see what's new.

  • Articos v2.0.0.0
    Get user research insights in 30 minutes, without recruitment.
    User interviews
    Open
    12,618 www.articos.com
    Team Articos
    🛠️ 1 tool
    All notable changes to Articos are documented here v2 is a major platform rebuild introducing A/B testing research, and AI-powered persona interviews via Cloud Tasks, a structured report pipeline with charts and citations, deep persona generation, and a fully redesigned UI. The backend was migrated to Python across all primary Cloud Functions. New Research Type: A/B Testing ------------------------------- - New ab-test research type for comparing two variants (e.g., landing page A vs. B) - Variant preview section with live browsing animation during interview setup - A/B comparison sections in the report with side-by-side analysis - Screenshots of each variant proxied through Firebase Storage - Goal selection limited to a single goal per study - Auto-naming support for A/B test research AI Persona Interviews (Step 4) ------------------------------- - Persona interviews now triggered via Cloud Tasks (fully async) - Full interview status lifecycle: not-started > setting-up > in-progress > completed - Interview questions chained via previous_response_id for coherent multi-turn conversations - Research context and roleplay prompt injected into follow-up answers - Medium reasoning effort enabled for interview AI - View Transcript and Follow Up Question buttons on completed interview cards - Preparing the state shown on the interview card during the setup phase - Live browsing animation while AI interviews are running Structured Report Pipeline (Step 5) ------------------------------------- - Full structured report UI with charts, citations, and evidence drawers - Report sections written in parallel for faster generation - Pipeline resumes from the last completed stage on re-entry (no restart) - Progressive loading states with skeleton UI and auto-scroll - TOC sidebar with section navigation and ellipsis truncation on long titles - Expert critique sections with correct prompts per research type - A/B variant screenshots labelled as "Variant A" / "Variant B" in the report - Report download and share buttons with PDF export hook - Public report endpoint updated to serve structured pipeline reports - Section IDs sanitised for Firestore paths - Comparison matrix columns aligned when LLM includes label headers Deep Persona Generation (Step 2) ---------------------------------- - Progressive persona loading -- each profile updates independently as it completes - Geocoding and dynamic persona attributes (country flags, world map pins) - Archetype field rendered in persona card header - OCEAN personality scores normalised to a 1-100 scale- - Location and origin country rules added to the deep persona prompt - Global location diversity enforced (no US default) - Radar chart with secondary attribute dimensions from generate_relevancy_dimensions - Persona card bio tooltip showing full text - Edit persona modal hides AI refinement section when step is completed - Edit/delete buttons disabled on persona cards after step 2 is completed - Generation state persisted across step navigation Auto Study Type Detection (Step 1) ------------------------------------ - Research type (idea-validation, landing-page-feedback, ab-test) now auto-detected from conversation -- no upfront selector - inferredStage returned from backend and consumed by frontend - Conversation saving shifted from backend to frontend - Profile selection is disabled after step completion to prevent race conditions - Research names no longer include _study{n} suffix - Row-based roles UI replaces card grid on ProfileCard UI / Design System ------------------- - Full platform UI revamp (Step 1, Step 2, Step 3 redesigns) - Design tokens replace hardcoded colors and arbitrary spacing values - ActionTooltip component added and applied across the platform - Follow-up chat panel restyled to Articos warm gold/cream design system - Follow-up sidebar collapses on open - Accessibility: aria-label added to all icon-only buttons - Scatter chart uses dynamic domain; persona bio filter fixed [v0.2.8] and earlier ===================== Legacy releases prior to the v2 platform rebuild. See git history for details.
    2

    Create studio-quality songs from just a few words.
    Music
    Open
    Text to Song AI — v2.0.0
    🎵 Text to Song AI v2.0.0 — Changelog ✨ New Features 1. Next-Gen AI Model — Upgraded to the latest music generation model for higher-quality output. 2. Synced Lyrics — Song detail pages now display time-stamped lyrics that highlight in real time as the music plays. Follow along word by word. 3. 12 Language Support — Now available in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic, Indonesian, and Turkish. 4. Daily Check-in & Rewards — Earn free credits every day and build streaks for bonus rewards. 🚀 Improvements 1. Redesigned Homepage — A faster, cleaner hero section with a prompt-first experience and rotating inspiration prompts. 2. Custom Music Player — Completely rebuilt for smoother playback and a better mobile experience. 3. Mobile Navigation — New bottom navigation bar for easier one-handed use on mobile devices. 4. Smart Form Caching — Your song settings are preserved even after signing in with Google, so you never lose your setup. ⚡ Performance 1. Faster & Lighter — Reduced bundle size, optimized assets, improved CDN caching, and database tuning for noticeably faster load times.

  • Notis 2.5.5
    Your AI Intern One Message Away From All Your Tool Stack.
    Personal assistant
    Open
    1,001,053 notis.ai
    Florian
    🛠️ 2 tools 🙏 60 karma
    Notis is the AI intern one message away from your entire tool stack. Dictate ideas, delegate the busywork, and watch it update everything from your CRM to your socials — right from WhatsApp, iMessage, Telegram, or email. In this week’s release: - Safer automations that catch duplicate, runaway, and self-triggered webhook activity earlier, with automatic pausing for problematic automations. - More reliable WhatsApp and iMessage handling for tricky incoming-message edge cases. - Better failure handling for messaging automations, so delivery issues can pause an automation instead of letting it keep failing silently. - More reliable scheduled notifications in production after a background job fix. - Temporary AI rate limits no longer wipe conversation history. - Tighter account safety controls so blocked accounts can no longer continue sending messages through Notis.

  • Reply v2.0
    Generate leads, convert website traffic, or hire sales AI SDRs.
    Sales
    Open
    11,049 reply.io
    Svitlana Shuliak
    🛠️ 1 tool
    Most outreach tools make you juggle five platforms just to send one sequence. Reply changes that. This release brings together three connected upgrades: visitor tracking, real-time data enrichment, and AI-powered personalization. Together, they let you identify who's ready to buy, build complete contact profiles automatically, and reach out with messaging that feels researched and relevant. All without the manual work that usually slows you down. — Website Visitor Tracking. Know who's showing up — Stop guessing who visits your site. Reply now identifies anonymous traffic and routes those visitors straight into your sales sequences while their interest is still warm. - See the actual companies and people browsing your site - Automatically push visitors into a Reply sequence the moment they show interest - Reach prospects while they're comparing solutions before they contact a competitor - Deploy unique tracking scripts for different websites or subdomains, and manage all traffic sources from one dashboard — Smarter enrichment. Fill in every gap, automatically — A lead with missing data isn't a lead you can act on. Reply's enrichment now goes further, turning incomplete records into fully actionable contacts ready for multichannel outreach. — Find missing email addresses If an email is missing, Reply discovers and verifies it automatically – searching public sources, generating addresses from company domains, and confirming deliverability. Every email added to your list is one you can confidently use. - Find phone numbers Reply now enriches contacts with direct dial and mobile numbers, validates format and region, and adds them to the contact profile, so you're ready to reach prospects across every channel, not just email. — Live Web Search for AI Variables. Personalization at scale — Live Web Search on any AI variable pulls fresh, real-time data: recent news, funding rounds, product launches, hiring activity, before populating that field in your sequence. When your email references something current and specific, it signals that you actually did your homework. That relevance is what turns cold outreach into real conversations. What used to take hours of manual research per prospect now happens in seconds, automatically, for every contact on your list. Identify your best prospects, build complete contact profiles, and reach out with messages that actually land. All from one platform, without the manual overhead. Less setup. Smarter outreach. More meetings on the calendar. See what Reply can do now — start your free trial today.
    3

    If you can imagine it, Biela can code it!
    Vibe coding
    Open
    122,457 biela.dev
    Biela Dev
    🛠️ 1 tool 🙏 7 karma
    INTRODUCING MOBILE APP CREATION ON BIELA Build Apps. Launch Everywhere. We’re excited to announce a major expansion of Biela- you can now create fully functional mobile applications directly on biela.dev. Your app idea has been waiting long enough. Most people with a great app idea never launch. Not because the idea isn’t good - because the road between “I want to build this” and “it’s live in the App Store” is expensive, technical, and slow. Biela just removed that road. Describe your app. Get your app. Biela generates everything - screens, navigation, design, logic - from a single prompt. Multi-platform code, works on both Android and iOS. Your app is built for both platforms from the start. You’re not picking a lane or paying twice. Live in the stores - without the usual nightmare. App Store approval processes are notoriously painful. Biela gives you a straight path from creation to published on the App Store Built for real users, not a pitch deck. What Biela builds is production-ready - something you can hand to customers on day one and grow from there. You already have a website on Biela? Now you have an app too. Web, iOS, Android - one platform, one workflow. The only thing standing between your idea and a live app is a prompt.

  • Tendem
    AI + Human Agent to get tasks done
    Task automation
    Open
    212,880 tendem.ai
    Vladimir Gromozdin
    🙏 4 karma
    Feb 18, 2026
    @Tendem
    I work on the Tendem team, so take this with that context — but I also use the product constantly for my own work. I've used Tendem to research AI directories — finding relevant ones, pulling submission requirements, organizing everything into a spreadsheet I could act on. I've also used it for copy edits — sending over drafts and getting back tightened, polished versions without going back and forth with a prompt ten times. The thing that keeps me coming back is how little I have to think about the handoff. I describe what I need, send it, and move on to something else. It's slower than getting a ChatGPT response, sure. But I get something finished — not a starting point I still need to rework. When you use AI tools for this kind of work, you trade waiting time for cleanup time. Tendem flips that. I'd rather wait and get a result I can use than get a fast draft I have to fix myself.
    51 Reply Share Edit Delete Report
    Share
    Released 4mo ago
    No pricing
    245,676
    171
    4.6

  • lxi.ai

    Shawn Vybiral
    🙏 62 karma
    Jun 7, 2024
    @lxi.ai
    This could be a really great service that I would love to have. The way it creates documents would be perfect for the philosophical doctrine I'm writing but unfortantilly I couldn't use this because of the hotkey setup. I am very use to pressing CTRL Backspace to backspace by word instead of character and its ingraned in me. Its the hotkey that deletes a node on the canvas so I was deleting my nodes every time I wanted to change a word. There needs to be a way to disable the hotkey. I tried finding a way to email the developer but I couldn't find anything. Based on the idea I would give this 5stars but in its current state I cant use it. Eventually the whole thing locked up on me and I couldn't interact with the canvas in anyway.

    Katie G
    🙏 115 karma
    Feb 26, 2024
    @B12 AI Website Builder
    B12 exceeded my expectations especially after I tried a few similar tools. Signing up took under a minute and because I offer a very specific set of services as a consultant, I didn't expect the AI to be able to capture my work, but it did a great job with creating content for me. I only had to make a few edits, add my bio, and was able to publish that same day. Now I get lots of compliments on my site and I've even tried their other tools like email marketing, which is great because the emails match my site's appearance. Overall I would recommend B12 as an effective, affordable, and easy to use website solution.

⌘ + D bookmark this site for future reference
